title: Zombies+
description: Zombies+ is a mod-pack for players who crave a true apocalypse experience in Minecraft. The undead are faster, smarter, and deadlier.
body:
Zombies+ is a mod-pack for players who crave a true apocalypse experience in Minecraft. The undead are faster, smarter, and deadlier thanks to mods like Ashen’s Zombie Apocalypse, Zombie Awareness, Zombies Improved, and Zombies Revamped. Expect relentless hordes, infected players, and grotesque new zombie variants that will hunt you without rest.

Survival means staying armed and alert — Point Blank and its recipe packs supply you with an arsenal of firearms, while Just Barricades and Veinminer let you quickly gather resources and fortify your position. Every bullet counts when the mobs swarm and ammo runs dry.

The world is more immersive and beautiful — but no less dangerous. Biomes O’ Plenty, Lithostitched, and TerraBlender expand the landscapes, while shaders like BSL, Complementary Reimagined, and Photon bring dynamic lighting, realistic shadows, and atmospheric skies. Resource packs such as Fresh Animations, Better Leaves, Cubic Sun & Moon, and Fresh Moves give mobs and the environment lifelike motion, making every encounter feel more real — and more terrifying.

With quality-of-life tools like AppleSkin, BetterF3, Xaero’s Minimap, and Simple Voice Chat, plus performance boosters like Embeddium, FerriteCore, and ModernFix, Zombies+ delivers a smooth yet relentless survival horror experience. The nights are darker, the dead are smarter, and the only way to make it to sunrise is to fight for every breath.
